Adds__Status_Bursting Grotesquerie_Desc: Covered in rupturing cells, which will explode when this effect expires.
Bosse_Lindwurm_Status_Bursting Grotesque: Covered in rupturing cells, which will explode when this effect expires.
Bosse_Unknown Source_Status_Bonds Of Fle: Ensnared by a chain of cells, which will transform into Unbreakable Flesh α when this effect expires.
Ensnared by a chain of cells, which will transform into Unbreakable Flesh β when this effect expires.
Bosse_Unknown Source_Status_Bursting Gro: Covered in rupturing cells, which will explode when this effect expires.
Bosse_Unknown Source_Status_Directed Gro: Covered in hemorrhagic cells, which will spray in the indicated direction when this effect expires.
Bosse_Unknown Source_Status_Fate Of The: Bound to the earth and unable to jump.
Bosse_Unknown Source_Status_Mitotic Phas: Infected by self-replicating cells that will cause unaspected damage to the surrounding area and spread mitotic cells when this effect expires.
Bosse_Unknown Source_Status_Rotting Fles: Infected by dying cells. Will result in extreme damage when this effect expires unless these cells are purged by taking damage from certain attacks. Purging cells will result in unaspected damage to the surrounding area.
Bosse_Unknown Source_Status_Shared Grote: Covered in fusing cells, which will create a concentrated explosion when this effect expires.
Bosse_Unknown Source_Status_Unbreakable: Chained by alpha-variant cells to a partner. Partners moving too far from one another will result in a burst of damage centered around them.
Chained by beta-variant cells to a partner. Partners moving too far from one another will result in a burst of damage centered around them.
ContentDesc_Arkadion - Superschwergewich: The legendary Lindwurm, a serpentine beast renowned for its unequaled regenerative abilities. The president had long sought to heal his ailing fighters with these powers to no avail, only finding success after making the ultimate sacrifice. But what if the Lindwurm's regeneration truly had no limit─what if it could recover from even the most grievous wound? You imagine that dreadful battle once again, now more dreadful still...
Instancecontenttextdata_40708_Text: What power! Looks like someone isn't holding back!
Instancecontenttextdata_40711_Text: Oh dear! The challenger has fallen out of the ring!
Instancecontenttextdata_40732_Text: Once again they slip beyond their opponent's reach!
Instancecontenttextdata_40733_Text: Oh no, they've been felled with a vengeance!
Instancecontenttextdata_40734_Text: And they're down! Can they recover from this?
Instancecontenttextdata_40736_Text: And they're back in action! Can they turn the tide!?
Instancecontenttextdata_43901_Text: His arm has a life of its own! Is this the power of the mythical Lindwurm?
Instancecontenttextdata_43902_Text: His arm is slithering out! That's disgusting!
Instancecontenttextdata_43904_Text: Watch out! That is one cruel coil...
Instancecontenttextdata_43905_Text: Oh no! The champion's been crushed!
Instancecontenttextdata_43907_Text: Dear me, the ring's in pieces!
Instancecontenttextdata_43908_Text: Oh no, the gore has latched onto the champion! Don't panic!
Instancecontenttextdata_43910_Text: What the─? Could the Lindwurm's regeneration be out of control!?
Instancecontenttextdata_43911_Text: His power continues to run amok! Again and again he remakes his arms!
Instancecontenttextdata_43913_Text: Yes, you've got the serpent on the back tail! Press the advantage and finish this!
